_comment: Maps levelID + chapterIndex to a sketch-style scene image, and levelID to a 3-4 panel conclusion comic. Swap any placeholder URL for a real illustration and nothing else needs to change — the loader (loadSceneAsset / loadConclusionAssets in script.js) just reads this file at runtime.

1.alt: Pencil-sketch of the Voss Estate library, a shattered display case at its center
1.caption: THE SCENE — Voss Estate Library

2.alt: Sketch of a folded coded note tucked into a coat lining
2.caption: THE EVIDENCE — Coded Note

3.alt: Sketch of a dockmaster's office terminal glowing in a dark harbor building
3.caption: THE TRAIL — Wharf Office

1.alt: Sketch of four breached bank vaults in a dim corridor
1.caption: THE SCENE — Blackwood Trust

2.alt: Sketch of a second coded note pinned to a corkboard
2.caption: THE EVIDENCE — Second Note

3.alt: Sketch of an old freight office terminal among rail yard crates
3.caption: THE TRAIL — Freight Office

1.alt: Sketch of Ashcombe Manor's east wing with five guests scattered through the halls
1.caption: THE SCENE — Ashcombe Manor

2.alt: Sketch of a third, more elaborate coded note under a desk lamp
2.caption: THE EVIDENCE — Third Note

3.alt: Sketch of a study terminal beneath a tall east-facing window at dawn
3.caption: THE TRAIL — East Study

easy.caption: The scene of the crime — the shattered case, the missing heirloom.
The initial clue — cufflinks dropped in haste, hands that shouldn't be empty.
The secondary interrogation — a nervous confession, a lie half-told.
The deduction — library, cufflinks, butler. Alibi falsified. Case closed.

medium.caption: Four vaults, four methods, one crew.
The fourth vault was a decoy — the real prize still missing.
Nadia, Owen, Vivian, Marcus — the order finally falls into place.
The real prize, recovered. Story filed.

hard.caption: Five guests, five alibis, one manor.
The sunrise was always the will — hidden in plain sight.
The east study terminal, and the order of five rooms.
Every vault, every cipher, every room. The true will, revealed.
